definition:
A man of the Arabs living at the time of the Patriarchs, first mentioned at Gen.25.13; 
 son of: Ishmael (H3458); 
 brother of: Nebaioth (H5032), Adbeel (H0110), Mibsam (H4017), Mishma (H4927), Dumah (H1746), Massa (H4854), Hadad (H2301), Tema (H8485), Jetur (H3195), Naphish (H5305), Kedemah (H6929) and Mahalath (H4258) 
 § Kedar = "dark"
1) a son of Ishmael
n pr people
2) the descendants of Kedar
